decisions.title: Checkpoint M3-vpvr-plan
decisions.description: Checkpoint criado para cadeia Commit-Driven de VPVR com cardinalidade-first (caps/janelas), subjects definidos e escopo MVP fechado sem schema fisico no feature-pack.

decisions.title: Commit Chain: VPVR
decisions.description: Chain C1..C6 registrada com dominio/core+invariantes, storage write path, delivery read path, golden replay, gates e rollback por commit.
alternatives: Merge unico sem gates por commit
Executar delivery antes de storage hot path

decisions.title: MVP scope confirmado
decisions.description: Escopo MVP fixado: input unico marketdata.trade.v1.{venue}.{instrument}; outputs insights.volume_profile_snapshot.v1.{venue}.{instrument}(draft) e insights.volume_profile_delta.v1.{venue}.{instrument}(planned); WS suporta last snapshot e range paginado com caps de cardinalidade para 1m/5m/1h/4h/1d.
alternatives: Incluir markprice/bookdelta no calculo de volume
Permitir queries sem limite de range

decisions.title: Decision instrument vs symbol
decisions.description: Seguir mapping canonico do Delivery M2: WS usa subject com symbol normalizado para token canonico de instrument (NormalizeSymbol -> CanonicalInstrument). Event-bus continua em {instrument}. Consistencia garantida por testes de equivalencia instrument/symbol no dominio delivery.
alternatives: Separar semanticamente symbol e instrument em runtime agora
Aceitar symbol cru no WS sem normalizacao

decisions.title: Risco P0: subject drift e roots nao permitidos
decisions.description: Mitigacao: commit docs/contracts isolado antes de runtime, removendo placeholders TBD e alinhando matriz event-bus/registry para subjects VPVR com status draft/planned e root insights.
alternatives: Adiar registry ate fim da cadeia

decisions.title: Risco P0: determinismo/idempotencia/replay
decisions.description: Mitigacao: bucket assignment deterministico com tick_size e caps; idempotency key deterministica por janela+bucket+seq/version; writer hot com upsert idempotente; golden replay VPVR byte-stable 50x e hook de mismatch.

decisions.title: Risco P0: backpressure e cardinalidade
decisions.description: Mitigacao: estrategia obrigatoria compress->degrade->drop (drop apenas delta intermediario), caps hard de buckets/levels/windows/query e testes de limite no dominio/delivery.

decisions.title: Checkpoint: gate failure before C1 runtime chain
decisions.description: Cadeia interrompida no commit inicial de docs devido falha de gate no hook go-lint. Falhas reportadas em internal/core/insights/domain/heatmap_bucket.go (gocyclo Validate=20>15) e internal/core/insights/app/build_heatmap.go (var heatmapSizeBuckets unused). Nenhum commit VPVR aplicado.
alternatives: Corrigir debt de lint em commit isolado antes de retomar VPVR

decisions.title: Checkpoint: C1 gate failure (vpvr domain)
decisions.description: Parada imediata da cadeia VPVR em C1 por falha de gate no commit hook go-lint: cyclomatic complexity 18 (>15) em internal/core/insights/domain/volume_profile.go func (VolumeProfileSnapshotV1).Validate. Nenhum commit C1 aplicado.
alternatives: Refatorar Validate em helpers menores e reexecutar gates

decisions.title: C1 checklist audit PASS
decisions.description: Checklist C1: PASS subject taxonomy (volume_profile types em insights.* e roots permitidas), PASS BC boundary (implementacao confinada a core/insights), PASS determinismo (bucket assignment + ordenacao + testes), PASS cardinalidade (caps e timeframes em codigo + teste de cap), PASS storage hot-path (nao tocado no C1), PASS replay (nao tocado; gate replay-golden verde), PASS observability (deferido para C6 conforme plano). Evidence hooks: internal/core/insights/domain/volume_profile.go:12, internal/core/insights/domain/volume_profile.go:17, internal/core/insights/domain/volume_profile.go:53, internal/core/insights/domain/volume_profile.go:64, internal/core/insights/domain/volume_profile_test.go:9, internal/core/insights/domain/volume_profile_test.go:20, docs/contracts/event-bus.md:50, docs/contracts/event-bus.md:72, docs/contracts/subject-registry.yaml:145, internal/adapters/jetstream/subject_validation.go:15, internal/adapters/jetstream/subject_validation.go:44.
alternatives: Marcar C1 como FAIL por ausencia de storage/replay/metrics no commit

decisions.title: C1 gates PASS
decisions.description: Gates C1 executados e verdes: docs-check-full, invariants-check, commit-msg-check, test-unit, test-workspace, test-workspace-race, test-replay-golden.

decisions.title: STOP-C2
decisions.description: Gate hard-stop em C2: hook commit-msg-conventional falhou por titulo >72 chars (77/72) ao tentar commit do builder VPVR. Nenhum commit C2 criado. Proximo corretivo: recommit com mensagem curta padrao feat(m3): ... sem alterar codigo.
alternatives: Alterar escopo de codigo no mesmo passo (evitar)

decisions.title: C2 plan (atomic)
decisions.description: C2 objetivo: builder VPVR a partir de marketdata.trade com snapshot/delta in-memory e idempotency key deterministica. Arquivos acoplados: internal/core/insights/app/build_volume_profile.go e internal/core/insights/app/build_volume_profile_test.go. Gates planejados/executados: docs-check-full, invariants-check, commit-msg-check, test-unit, test-workspace, test-workspace-race, test-replay-golden. Rollback: git revert <hash C2> apos commit.

decisions.title: C2 gates runtime PASS pre-commit
decisions.description: Antes do commit C2, todos gates de make executados ficaram verdes (docs/invariants/commit-msg-check/test-unit/test-workspace/test-workspace-race/test-replay-golden). O bloqueio ocorreu apenas no hook de commit-msg-conventional por titulo >72 chars.
alternatives: Considerar gate fail global e resetar mudancas
Repetir commit com titulo curto convencional

decisions.title: C2 committed + gates ok
decisions.description: C2 commit confirmado: 1c01625 feat(m3): vpvr builder usecase and tests. Escopo atomico mantido em 2 arquivos de app (build_volume_profile.go, build_volume_profile_test.go). Gates executados em ordem e verdes: commit-msg-check, docs-check-full, invariants-check, test-unit, test-workspace, test-workspace-race, test-replay-golden.
alternatives: Avancar para C3 sem registrar checkpoint

decisions.title: C3 start
decisions.description: Escopo C3: implementar hot writer Timescale VPVR com upsert idempotente e testes, limitado a internal/core/insights/ports/storage.go, internal/adapters/storage/timescale/volume_profile_writer.go e internal/adapters/storage/timescale/volume_profile_writer_test.go. Invariantes obrigatorios: VPVR-STO-1 key sem seqMax; VPVR-STO-2 ON CONFLICT deterministico com merge buy/sell/total/seqMin/seqMax; VPVR-STO-3 port retorna *problem.Problem; VPVR-STO-4 ack-on-commit preservado (nenhum ACK antes de write); VPVR-STO-5 replay safety sem duplicata.
alternatives: Incluir replay/overload neste commit (fora de escopo)

decisions.title: C3 committed + gates ok
decisions.description: C3 commit b82f737 aplicado com escopo atomico em 3 arquivos: internal/core/insights/ports/storage.go, internal/adapters/storage/timescale/volume_profile_writer.go, internal/adapters/storage/timescale/volume_profile_writer_test.go. Invariantes VPVR-STO-1..5 atendidos: key sem seqMax, merge deterministico, port com *problem.Problem, sem ACK no writer (boundary externo CommitAndAck), replay safety coberta por testes. Gates verdes: commit-msg-check, docs-check-full, invariants-check, test-unit, test-workspace, test-workspace-race, test-replay-golden, registry-check, lint. TODO criado: sql/timescale/insights_volume_profile_hot.sql.
alternatives: Dividir C3 em dois commits (port e writer separados)

decisions.title: C3 gate timings
decisions.description: Tempos aproximados dos gates C3: commit-msg-check 0.1s; docs-check-full 5.3s; invariants-check 0.1s; test-unit 4.6s; test-workspace 6.5s; test-workspace-race 3.6s; test-replay-golden 0.3s; registry-check 0.4s; lint 5.5s. Todos PASS.
